ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "bullet_points" TEXT /* Bullet points highlighting key features of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) */,
  "ean" TEXT /* European Article Number (EAN) */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code (UPC) */,
  "mpn" TEXT /* Manufacturer Part Number (MPN) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the product */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the product */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the product is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "parent_product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the category is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_to_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "is_primary_category" INTEGER /* Whether the category is primary for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "is_low_stock" INTEGER /* Whether the product is low in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventories_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of the address (shipping or billing) */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the address is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the address is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the address is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_transactions_payment_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logistics_providers" (
  "logistics_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logistics provider */,
  "logistics_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the logistics provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the logistics provider */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the logistics provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logistics_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "logistics_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logistics provider */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date of the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_logistics_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("logistics_provider_id") REFERENCES logistics_providers ("logistics_provider_id")
)
